full_text:
Dian Man 典滿
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dian Man (典滿)was born in Chenliu. Served Wei. Dian Wei’s son, became a member of Cao Cao’s bodyguard. Dian Man was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
